live_migration_support_notes: Live migration is allowed only when Ignite CDC is enabled and source cache/key/update ordering is provable; otherwise use DataStreamer/key-range polling and do not claim native live cutover.
initial_snapshot_or_seed: cluster/cache snapshot or admitted cache scan through thin-client/JDBC route
delta_feed_or_change_capture: Ignite CDC events ordered by cache/key/update metadata
proxy_method: thin-client/JDBC/ODBC proxy with cache/table readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: DataStreamer import plus key-range polling when CDC is unavailable; true live cutover requires waiver
required_cutover_barrier: CDC drained; cache descriptors stable; affinity/topology metadata mapped; dual-read/write compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse reference migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render reference diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to ReferenceLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; reference feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests reference regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
